name: cascadecamp
description: A small static launch site for `cascade.camp`.

scripts.cf:r2:list: bash -lc 'set -a; source .env; set +a; wrangler r2 bucket list'
scripts.cf:r2:create: bash -lc 'set -a; source .env; set +a; wrangler r2 bucket create ${CLOUDFLARE_R2_BUCKET:-cascade-camp-media}'
scripts.cf:r2:upload-hero: bash -lc 'set -a; source .env; set +a; wrangler r2 object put ${CLOUDFLARE_R2_BUCKET:-cascade-camp-media}/hero/cascade-hero-loop.mp4 --file assets/cascade-hero-loop.mp4 --content-type video/mp4 --remote'
scripts.cf:r2:s3:list: bash -lc 'set -a; source .env; set +a; AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=auto aws s3 ls s3://${CLOUDFLARE_R2_BUCKET:-cascade-camp-media} --endpoint-url https://${CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID}.r2.cloudflarestorage.com'
scripts.cf:r2:s3:upload-hero: bash -lc 'set -a; source .env; set +a; endpoint=https://${CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID}.r2.cloudflarestorage.com; bucket=${CLOUDFLARE_R2_BUCKET:-cascade-camp-media}; AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=auto aws s3 cp assets/cascade-hero-loop.mp4 s3://$bucket/hero/cascade-hero-loop.mp4 --endpoint-url $endpoint --content-type video/mp4 --cache-control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable" && AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=auto aws s3 cp assets/cascade-hero-poster.jpg s3://$bucket/hero/cascade-hero-poster.jpg --endpoint-url $endpoint --content-type image/jpeg --cache-control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable"'
